history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is visible in my local view, and directly in front of me appears to be a floor (.) rather than lava (L). So I should move forward toward the corridor leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible ahead on my left side, but the cell directly in front of me appears to be lava (L). Since I can't move forward into lava, I need to change my orientation to approach the goal from a safe direction. I will turn left to face toward the corridor containing the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I currently see only unknown cells and a wall boundary to my front-left, but the goal/lava aren’t visible yet. I need to explore to reveal more of the map, so I will start by turning right to change my facing.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal G, but directly ahead is a wall (#) so moving forward is impossible. To find a path around the wall and toward the goal, I should rotate to look for a safe forward move.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible in the local map. I am currently facing a wall in front, so I should turn to find a safe path toward G while avoiding the lava L.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
In my current local view, the goal G is visible to the right of me, but the cell directly in front of me appears to be lava L (the line "??#^LL#" shows lava immediately to the right of my position, and since forward is upward in the view, I should first rotate to face the corridor toward G). I will turn right to align toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
In the current local view, the goal `G` is immediately to the left of my position (the row with `#GL.#?` shows `^` under the `.` after `L`, so the cell one step left from me is `G`). Moving forward would hit `L`, which is deadly. I will turn left so I can move toward `G`.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal (G) to the right, but directly in front of me is an unknown cell (?). To progress safely toward the visible goal area, I should rotate to the right first so I can align with the open space leading toward G.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal G to the left of me in the corridor, but the cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so moving forward would be deadly. To head toward G, I should turn left to face the open cell leading toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal (G) in the upper area of my view, but directly in front of me is unknown (?), and I also can see lava (L) to the upper-right relative to my position. To avoid moving into lava or a wall, I should first rotate to better align toward the visible goal while checking the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can’t see the goal or lava yet; the only visible open spaces are near me. The safest move is to turn so I can start exploring in a new direction and hopefully reveal the G location.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
In my current local view, the goal G is visible to the left of my position. The cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so moving forward would be deadly. I should turn left to face toward the open path leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I can’t see the goal or any open safe path clearly yet; most of the local area is unknown. I should start by turning to look for a safe route or the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
In my current local view I can see the goal G two cells to my right (relative to my position). The cell directly in front of me is a wall (#) so moving forward is not possible. To move toward the goal, I should rotate clockwise so I can face the open path leading toward G.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
In the current view, the goal `G` is visible to the left of my position, and the cell directly in front of me is floor `.` (safe). Moving forward advances toward the area with `G` while avoiding lava `L` at the left-lower corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
